title: Remote Work Hardware Reimbursement Policy
body: Effective June 1, 2027, Acme Corp will reimburse eligible employees up to $1,000 per year for approved home office hardware purchases. This includes monitors, keyboards, and ergonomic chairs. Receipts required.

title: Remote Work Hardware Reimbursement FAQ
body: Current FAQ (needs update): The hardware reimbursement limit is $500.
